name: proactive_checkin
description: Random tired check-ins from Ellen after silence
messages: *yawns* just checking. don't read into it.
you had that thing. did you do it.
...I'm here if you need me. not that I was waiting.
shark_facts: sharks have existed longer than trees. older than rings on saturn. think about that.
some sharks glow in the dark. biofluorescent. it's a flex.
shark skin is basically tiny teeth. denticles. don't pet one.
great whites can detect a drop of blood in 100 liters of water. show off.
cookiecutter sharks bite circles out of bigger fish. ...iconic.
sharks can detect electromagnetic fields. ampullae of Lorenzini. fancy name for cheating.
the greenland shark lives 400+ years. doesn't even try.
